workflow_name: Drop Database via DB2 System Catalog

steps.description: Type option 1 to select DB2 system catalog on the DB2 Admin main menu
Press Enter to navigate to the System Catalog Objects screen
Type a name filter pattern in the Schema filter field to narrow the search to the target database
Type option D to select Databases in the Option field on the System Catalog Objects screen
Press Enter to display the list of matching databases
Type line command T in the Select field next to the target database to view its tables for pre-drop verification
Press Enter to navigate to the Tables, Views, and Aliases list for the selected database
Press PF3 to return to the Databases list
Type line command DROP in the Select field next to the target database to initiate the drop
Press Enter to navigate to the Drop Database confirmation screen
Clear the Display Drop Impact Report field and type the desired report option
steps.placeholder: [Drop Impact Report Option (Yes, No, or Batch)]

steps.description: Press Enter to proceed — a Change Management prompt will appear
Type the response to the Change Management prompt asking whether to use Change Management for the DROP statement
Press Enter to execute the DROP DATABASE statement — the screen will confirm DROP stmt executed
Press PF3 to return to the System Catalog Objects screen
Optionally type option D again in the Option field to re-query databases and confirm the database no longer exists
Press Enter — a No rows returned message confirms the database was successfully dropped
